programme.title: Day 1 - Qatar Equestrian Federation Cup
programme.desc: Qatar Equestrian Federation Cup 2026 concludes the Doha Equestrian Tour at Al Shaqab, bringing together more than 200 riders in CSI1* to CSI5* show jumping classes and a total prize purse of €784,000. The competition features ranking classes, Grand Prix action and decisive Jump-Off rounds, where faults and time determine the winners.

programme.title: Freiburg vs Aston Villa - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Final
programme.desc: The 2025–26 UEFA Europa League is the secondary club football tournament organised by UEFA. This is the second season played under a new format, which replaced the 32-team group stage with a 36-team league phase. Tottenham Hotspur are the reigning champions. The final will be played on 20 May 2026 at Beşiktaş Stadium in Istanbul, Turkey.

programme.title: Crystal Palace vs Rayo Vallecano - UEFA Conference League 2025/2026 - Final
programme.desc: The UEFA Conference League is the third-tier club football tournament organised by UEFA. The new format competition runs for its second season live and exclusive only on beIN. The RB Arena in Leipzig, Germany, is the venue for the Conference League final on 27 May 2026.

programme.desc: Highlights from the latest Premier League Matchweek. Review incorporates all the key moments and manager reaction from every fixture, making it a must-see programme for all Premier League fans.

programme.title: EN French Ligue 1 Highlights 2025/26 Season Review
programme.desc: All the very best action from the latest round of the French Ligue 1

programme.title: Leeds United vs Liverpool - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 15 - Mini Match
programme.desc: All 380 matches from the English Premier league are live and exclusive only on beIN. All matches are available live with a choice of Arabic or English commentary. The season will consist of 33 weekends and five midweek rounds of matches. Liverpool are the defending champions, having won their second Premier League title.

programme.title: West Ham United vs Arsenal - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 36
programme.desc: West Ham have lost 38 Premier League games against Arsenal – they’ve only lost more often against Liverpool, while the Gunners have only beaten Everton more. Arsenal have won their last two away league games against West Ham, winning 6-0 in 2023-24 and 5-2 last season. In English league history, only West Brom have scored 5+ goals in three consecut

programme.title: EN UCL Magazine 2025/26 | E36
programme.desc: A recap of the best of the action, plus a look forward to the next Match Day in Europe’s premium football competition, the UEFA Champions League. All matches from the UEFA Champions League are live and exclusive only on beIN.

programme.title: Freiburg vs Aston Villa - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Final
programme.desc: The 2025–26 UEFA Europa League is the secondary club football tournament organised by UEFA. This is the second season played under a new format, which replaced the 32-team group stage with a 36-team league phase. Tottenham Hotspur are the reigning champions. The final will be played on 20 May 2026 at Beşiktaş Stadium in Istanbul, Turkey.

programme.title: Crystal Palace vs Rayo Vallecano - UEFA Conference League 2025/2026 - Final
programme.desc: The UEFA Conference League is the third-tier club football tournament organised by UEFA. The new format competition runs for its second season live and exclusive only on beIN. The RB Arena in Leipzig, Germany, is the venue for the Conference League final on 27 May 2026.

programme.title: Ugo Humbert (FRA) vs Benjamin Bonzi (FRA) - ATP 250 Libéma Open 2026
programme.desc: ATP 250 Libéma Open 2026 opens the ATP grass-court season in ’s-Hertogenbosch, Netherlands. Played at the Autotron Rosmalen venue, the tournament has been part of the ATP calendar since 1990 and is known for fast grass conditions favouring aggressive players and strong servers as competitors begin preparations for Wimbledon.

programme.desc: Ahead of the FIFA World Cup 2026, a final chance for the participating Nations to play together as team in a match environment. All 104 matches from the FIFA World Cup are live and exclusive only on beIN SPORTS MAX Channels from 11th June – 19th July.

programme.desc: Roland-Garros 2026 The world’s best players return to the clay courts of Paris for the 125th edition of Roland-Garros, the second Grand Slam of the season. From opening-round battles to the iconic finals on Court Philippe-Chatrier, the tournament delivers two weeks of elite tennis, drama and endurance on the sport’s most demanding surface.

programme.title: Paris Saint-Germain vs Arsenal - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Final
programme.desc: The 2025–26 UEFA Champions League is live and exclusive only on beIN. Paris Saint-Germain are the defending champions. The 2025/26 UEFA Champions League will be the second to be played under the new 36-team league phase. The final will be played on 30 May 2026 at Puskás Aréna in Budapest, Hungary.

programme.title: Hull City vs Middlesbrough - Championship Playoff Final - EFL - English Football League SkyBet - Ch
programme.desc: Live and exclusive coverage only on beIN of the 2025–2026 EFL Championship. The EFL Championship is the second tier in the English Football league system. The season will run from 8 August 2025 until 2 May 2026.

programme.title: Crystal Palace vs Rayo Vallecano - UEFA Conference League 2025/2026 - Final
programme.desc: The UEFA Conference League is the third-tier club football tournament organised by UEFA. The new format competition runs for its second season live and exclusive only on beIN. The RB Arena in Leipzig, Germany, is the venue for the Conference League final on 27 May 2026.

programme.title: Freiburg vs Aston Villa - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Final
programme.desc: The 2025–26 UEFA Europa League is the secondary club football tournament organised by UEFA. This is the second season played under a new format, which replaced the 32-team group stage with a 36-team league phase. Tottenham Hotspur are the reigning champions. The final will be played on 20 May 2026 at Beşiktaş Stadium in Istanbul, Turkey.

programme.title: Mattia Bellucci (ITA) vs Yannick Hanfmann (GER) - ATP 250 Boss Open 2026
programme.desc: ATP 250 Boss Open 2026 takes place in Stuttgart, Germany, at Tennis Club Weissenhof. The tournament switched from clay to grass in 2015 and has since become one of the key Wimbledon warm-up events. Played on fast outdoor grass courts, it regularly attracts top-ranked players and big-serving grass-court specialists.

programme.title: Day 1 - ATP 500 HSBC Championships 2026
programme.desc: ATP 500 HSBC Championships 2026 returns to the historic Queen’s Club in London, one of the oldest and most prestigious grass-court tournaments in the world. First held in 1890, the event is considered a major Wimbledon warm-up and traditionally features many of the ATP Tour’s leading players competing for a key ATP 500 title.
